manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
Provide one single-word clue that relates to some of your team's words from the list below. You can choose to how many and to which words your clue relates to.
The goal is to have your partner guess all of your team's words based on the clues you give them, before the other team has uncovered all of theirs. If your partner guesses an 'opponent' or a 'distractor' word, their guessing turn ends and the opposing team gets to make a turn. If your partner guesses a 'kill' word, the game ends and your team loses immediately.
The more words your clue relates to, the quicker you can win the game, but the harder the associations may be to guess for your partner, so choose your clue word wisely. The clue word has to be semantically related to the target words, it cannot be one of the words in the lists or contain parts of them.

Always give your single-word clue and your comma-separated list of related target words in the following format and make your answers as short as possible, never include any other text than is required in this form:

CLUE: <WORD>
TARGETS: <TARGETS>

Your team words are: impunity, sexism, refutation, faithfulness, goodness, reconsideration, vindication, selectivity, repentance.
Your opponent's team words are: communicability, likelihood, interconnection, ability, imprecision, discernment, coercion, modularity.
Distractor words are: insentient, resourcefulness, veracity, exclusivity, savagery, symbolism, adage.
The kill words are: formality.

message.reasoning:
We need to provide a single-word clue and list of target words (our team's words) that it relates to. Need to avoid clue being any of the words in lists (team, opponent, distractor, kill). Also cannot contain parts of them. Provide as short as possible.

We need to consider associations. Goal is to help partner guess multiple words. Let's think of a clue that links several of our team's words: impunity, sexism, refutation, faithfulness, goodness, reconsideration, vindication, selectivity, repentance.

Common theme perhaps "morality", "justice", "ethics". Words: impunity (lack of punishment), sexism (discrimination), refutation (denial of claim), faithfulness (loyalty), goodness (virtue), reconsideration (re-evaluation), vindication (exoneration), selectivity (choosing), repentance (remorse). Could use clue "ethics". But that's close to "goodness" etc. "ethics" not in any list. Does "ethics" contain any part of words? No. It relates to many: sexism (ethical issue), impunity (ethical violation), faithfulness (ethical), goodness (ethical), repentance (ethical), vindication (ethical), selectivity (maybe less). Could be okay.

Maybe "redemption"? Relates to repentance, vindication, forgiveness, goodness. Contains "red" - not part of any words.

Let’s choose "justice". Relates to impunity (lack of justice), sexism (justice issue), vindication (justice), repentance (justice), goodness, selectivity (maybe). "justice" not in any list.

Clue: "justice". Provide list of target words that associate: impunity, sexism, vindication, repentance, goodness? Might be too many, but okay.

But must ensure clue not part of any word: "justice" none.

Provide: CLUE: justice

TARGETS: impunity, sexism, vindiction? Wait spelled "vindication". Provide that. Also repentance. Maybe also "refutation"? Not directly. Choose maybe 5 words.

Let's produce: CLUE: justice
TARGETS: impunity, sexism, vindication, repentance, goodness

Check for any disallowed substring: "just" appears in "justice". No team words contain "just". Ok.

Return format only.
